team_transparency.evidence: Uniswap Labs founded by Hayden Adams, core team publicly identified with verifiable track records. Development activity fully open-source on GitHub.

tokenomics_clarity.evidence: UNI token distribution comprehensively documented: 60% community, 21.266% team, 18.044% investors, 0.69% advisors. Four-year vesting schedule clearly specified.

audit_status.evidence: Multiple smart contract audits by Trail of Bits, ABDK Consulting, and independent security researchers. Bug bounty program active on Immunefi.

roadmap_realism.evidence: Concrete version history (v1, v2, v3) with delivered features including concentrated liquidity. Uniswap v4 hooks architecture documented with specific technical specifications.

red_flags_detected.evidence: No red flags detected. No guaranteed returns, no referral schemes, no pressure tactics. Documentation is technically focused without marketing hype.

technical_depth.evidence: Detailed AMM mechanics, concentrated liquidity math (x*y=k invariant), fee tier design, and oracle integration documented with mathematical proofs in whitepaper.

funding_transparency.evidence: UNI governance treasury allocation described. Community treasury controlled by governance. Uniswap Labs funding sources not fully detailed in docs.

community_governance.evidence: Comprehensive DAO governance: on-chain voting via Governor Bravo, proposal lifecycle documented, delegation mechanics, temperature checks via Snapshot.
